rulings.Case Title: CHU MING KWOK VS. LINDA AO GUAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Attorney'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 30, 2008 LINE 1. DEFENDANT LINDA GUAN'S Motion For Attorney'S Fees IS GRANTED AWARDING DEFENDANT $17,985. THE DECISION IN SANTISAS V GOODWIN (1998) 17 CAL. APP. 4TH 599 DIRECTS THE COURT TO AWARD ATTORNEYS FEES FOR THE TORT CAUSE OF ACTION; WHICH IS ONE OF THE THREE CAUSES OF ACTION LITIGATED. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: YEE KEUNG SIU VS. CHINATOWN ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT GROUP et al

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES SCHWAB & CO VS. LARRY YU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Larry Yu, Carly Fong, Phillip Shinn And Thornton Taylor Becker & Shinn'S Motion To Strike Complaint Against Public Policy (Ccp 425.16)
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 30, 2008 LINE 14. DEFENDANTS LARRY YU, CARLY FONG, PHILLIP SHINN AND THORNTON TAYLOR BECKER & SHINN'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT AGAINST PUBLIC POLICY (C.C.P. SECTION 425.16) IS GRANTED. THE REASONING IN COURT'S PRIOR ORDERS IN THIS ACTION IN CONNECTION WITH SCHWAB'S MOTION FOR A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AND SHINN'S ANTI-SLAPP APPLY TO MR. YU AND MS. FONG. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: MONETARY MANAGEMENT OF CALIFORNIA,INC., A VS. 1030 POLK ASSOCIATES, LP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 30, 2008 LINE 9. DEFENDANT 1030 POLK ASSOCIATES, L.P.'S Petition To Compel Arbitration IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS THE BURDEN OF PROOF TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THE PARTIES' AGREEMENT TO ARBITRATE COVERS THIS DISPUTE. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO PRESENT ANY EVIDENCE AS TO "PARTIAL DESTRUCTION OF THE PREMISES" OR THAT THE BUILDING WAS DECLARED "UNSAFE OR UNFIT FOR OCCUPANCY BY ANY AUTHORIZED PUBLIC AUTHORITY." DEFENDANT HAS PRESENTED NO EVIDENCE THAT P.G.& E., A PRIVATE COMPANY PERFORMING SERVICES AS A PUBLIC UTILITY, IS A "PUBLIC AUTHORITY" WITHIN THE MEANING OF THE PARTIES AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO THE BRAZIL DECLARATION ARE OVERRULED. =(302/PJM/AY)
